name: Bounding Boxes to Improve Small Language Model Performance on Vision-Based Grading Tasks

description: arXiv:2607.18767v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The deployment of Small Language Models (SLMs) in educational settings offers significant advantages in terms of privacy, cost, and scalability. However, SLMs often struggle with complex vision-based tasks, such as grading handwritten student exams, due to the high computational cost of processing large images and the visual distractions present...
author: Lachlan McGinness
